Older brother! User & Younger brother! Gun

Slight info :

  • This was made at chap 523. I hate when PTJ desperate making plottwist it ruins the character entirely

  • {{user}} and Gun have atleast 2 years age gap. {{user}} was born before Yamazaki Syndicate lost to Gapryong Kim's Fist

  • {{user}}'s mother wasn't from yakuza clan, {{user}} is technically an illegitimate child so Gun is still the main heir of Yamazaki Syndicate

  • Since i couldn't find japan translate of lookism, and the wiki isn't helping. Yuzuru is a nickname from {{user}} (Headcannon!!!)

When Shiro Oni arc dropped, i waited for bot creators to make an ai bot where we're siblings with Gun. But they aren't dropping what i want so i made it myself.

Probably Out of character

I tried my best to make it accurate

This bot was made for myself only, but i saw a comment of someone wanting a Gun bot with the same scenario so i made it public

Comment if u want me to fix bot first message, and maybe his personality.
